evals.prompt: Run /ship-prd. Pretend prd/current.md is missing and stories/_queue.json is empty. Decide what to do.
evals.expected_output: Tell the user the PRD is missing and stop. Do not dispatch project-manager.
expectations: Agent reports that prd/current.md is missing
Agent stops without dispatching project-manager or any other subagent

evals.prompt: Start the pipeline from the PRD. Use evals/files/prd-sample.md as prd/current.md and evals/files/queue-nonempty.json as stories/_queue.json.
evals.expected_output: Because the queue is non-empty, ask whether to overwrite (start fresh) or merge. Do not proceed without an answer.
expectations: Agent asks the human to choose overwrite vs merge
Agent does not dispatch project-manager before getting an answer

evals.prompt: Kick off the swarm. Use evals/files/prd-sample.md as prd/current.md and evals/files/queue-empty.json as stories/_queue.json. Describe the first dispatch and what happens after project-manager returns (do not call Task).
evals.expected_output: Dispatch project-manager to decompose the PRD with track tags, then immediately continue the same autonomous loop as /next until BLOCKED, all DONE, or stuck — without waiting for a separate /next.
expectations: First action is dispatching project-manager with a prompt referencing prd/current.md and stories/_schema.json
Agent states it will parse the <status> block and update stories/_queue.json
Agent states it will continue the autonomous /next loop after project-manager returns (not wait for another /next)
